# testRun

**Instance Property**

The test run object that executes the test.

## Declaration

```swift
var testRun: XCTestRun? { get }
```

## Discussion

An instance of [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTest/testRunClass], or `nil` if the test hasn’t run.

## Examining Test Properties

- **name**: The name of the test.
- **testCaseCount**: The number of test cases in the test.
- **testRunClass**: The test run subclass to instantiate when the test runs, which records the test’s results.
